[ { "token" : "吴耿锋", "start_offset" : 0, "end_offset" : 3, "type" : "CN_WORD", "position" : 0 }, { "token" : "正在学习", "start_offset" : 3, "end_offset" : 7, "type" : "CN_WORD", "position" : 1 }, { "token" : "学习", "start_offset" : 5, "end_offset" : 7, "type" : "CN_WORD", "position" : 2 }, { "token" : "es", "start_offset" : 7, "end_offset" : 9, "type" : "ENGLISH", "position" : 3 } ]} 集群概念 集群 ​ 节点通过设置集群名称，在同一网络中发现具有相同集群名称的节点，组成集群。每个集群都有一个 集群名称 作为标识，默认的集群名称为 elasticsearch。如果在同一网络中只有一个节点，则这个节点成为一个单节点集群 集群就是同一网络下，具有相同集群名称的ES服务节点的集合 节点 简单来讲，节点就是一个ElasticSearch进程，当我们启动一个ElasticSearch程序，就启动了一个节点，很多个节点集合在一起就成了集群，即使只有单个节点，也可以把它看成只有单个节点的集群。节点也分多种类型，主要分为 主节点、数据节点、协调节点和Ingest节点，每个节点都有各自的职责，如果集群中只有单个节点，那这个节点会扮演多个节点的角色，它需要独自完成整个搜索和索引的过程。集群对外提供服务时，相当于一个整体，集群中的每个节点都可以处理Http请求，每个请求经过一系列内部转发，处理完成后返回数据给外部客户端。集群内部每个节点之间通信使用Java API ，它的底层是基于TCP的自定义协议，而对于外部客户端，ES使用的是Restful风格的Http协议 ES集群节点角色功能 角色 数量 功能 master节点 1 master节点控制整个集群的元数据。只有Master Node节点可以修改节点状态信息及元数据(metadata)的处理，比如索引的新增、删除、分片路由分配、所有索引和相关 Mapping 、Setting 配置等等 master备选节点 n 有资格成为Master节点但暂时并不是Master的节点被称为 eligible 节点，该节点只是与集群保持心跳，判断Master是否存活，如果Master故障则参加新一轮的Master选举，通过在配置文件中设置 node.master=true 来设置该节点成为候选主节点，在 Elasticsearch 集群中只有候选节点才有选举权和被选举权。其他节点是不参与选举工作的 数据节点 n 数据节点，负责数据的存储和相关具体操作，比如索引数据的创建、修改、删除、搜索、聚合 协调节点 n 协调节点接受客户端搜索请求后将请求转发到与查询条件相关的多个data节点的分片上，然后多个data节点的分片执行查询语句或者查询结果再返回给协调节点，协调节点把各个data节点的返回结果进行整合、排序等一系列操作后再将最终结果返回给用户请求。协调节点，是一种角色，而不是真实的Elasticsearch的节点，你没有办法通过配置项来配置哪个节点为协调节点。集群中的任何节点，都可以充当协调节点的角色 Ingest节点 n 分片 Shards 索引是ES中最大的数据存储单元，我们可以往索引中不断写入文档，到了一定数量级，索引文件就会占满整个服务器的磁盘，磁盘容量只是其中一个问题，索引文件变的大，会严重降低搜索的效率。怎么解决这个问题呢？分片就是用来解决这些问题的，简单来讲，分片就是把单索引文件分成多份存储，且这些索引的分片可以分部在不同的机器上。假设单台机器磁盘容量1TB，现在需要存放5TB的索引数据，那就可以把5TB索引分成10份，分别存放到10台机器上每份500G，这就是所谓的分片 分片很重要，主要有两方面的原因 海量数据存储：允许你水平分割 /扩展你的内容容量 吞吐量：允许你在分片之上进行分布式的、并行的操作，进而提高性能/吞吐量 至于一个分片怎样分布，它的文档怎样聚合和搜索请求，是完全由Elasticsearch管理的，对于作为用户的你来说，这些都是透明的，无需过分关心 被混淆的概念是，一个Lucene索引 我们在Elasticsearch称作 分片 。 一个Elasticsearch索引 是分片的集合。 当Elasticsearch在索引中搜索的时候， 他发送查询到每一个属于索引的分片(Lucene 索引)，然后合并每个分片的结果到一个全局的结果集 每个shard都是一个最小工作单元，承载部分数据，lucene实例，完整的建立索引和处理请求的能力。增减节点时，shard会自动在nodes中负载均衡 分片主要解决海量数据存储和提高吞吐量 副本 Replicas 一个索引可以分成多个分片，分部在不同的机器上。那假设上面所说的10台机器中有一台发生故障了，在这台机器上的分片也就没了，就会导致索引损坏。为了解决索引高可用的问题，ES引入了副本机制，这里的副本指的就是分片的副本，分片的原始数据称为主分片，主分片和副本会放在不同的机器上，这样假设有一个分片丢失了，另外的分片可以作为后备。如果主分片的机器挂掉了，其中一个副本分片就会升级成主分片。同时，因为副本分片的工作和主分片是一样的，所以增加副本的数量可以提升查询性能 复制分片之所以重要，有两个主要原因 高可用：主分片节点宕机,副本分片升级为主分片,主分片与副本分分配时不在同一台主机,保证高可用 吞吐量：扩展你的搜索量/吞吐量，因为搜索可以在所有的副本上并行运行 primary shard和replica shard，每个document肯定只存在于某一个primary shard以及其对应的。replica shard中，不可能存在于多个primary shard replica shard是primary shard的副本，负责容错，以及承担读请求负载。副本中的数据保证强一致或最终一致 primary shard的数量在创建索引的时候就固定了，因为索引时，需要按照primary shard的数量为文档做路由（默认使用文档的_id属性取哈希值做路由，也可以通过routing指定使用其他文档字段取哈希值做路由）。replica shard的数量可以随时修改 primary shard的默认数量是5，replica默认是1，默认有10个shard，5个primary shard，5个replica shard primary shard不能和自己的replica shard放在同一个节点上（否则节点宕机，primary shard和副本都丢失，起不到容错的作用），但是可以和其他primary shard的replica shard放在同一个节点上 副本主要保证集群的高可用，提供故障转移能力，并且提高集群吞吐量 分配 Allocation ​ 将分片分配给某个节点的过程，包括分配主分片或者副本。如果是副本，还包含从主分片复制数据的过程。这个过程是由master节点完成的 ES底层架构 高级查询 DSL ​ ES中提供了一种强大的检索数据方式,这种检索方式称之为Query DSL Domain Specified Language ,Query DSL是利用Rest API传递JSON格式的请求体(Request Body)数据与ES进行交互，这种方式的丰富查询语法让ES检索变得更强大，更简洁。 官方文档 term-level-queries 官方术语查询文档 语法 12# GET /索引名/_doc/_search {json格式请求体数据}# GET /索引名/_search {json格式请求体数据} match 匹配查询 match 导入测试数据 search_analyzer 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546# 创建映射PUT /tehero_index{ "settings": { "index": { "number_of_shards": 1, "number_of_replicas": 1 } }, "mappings": { "_doc": { "dynamic": false, "properties": { "id": { "type": "integer" }, "content": { "type": "keyword", "fields": { "ik_smart_analyzer": { "type": "text", "analyzer": "ik_smart", "search_analyzer": "ik_smart" } } }, "name":{ "type":"text" }, "createAt": { "type": "date" } } } }}# 导入测试数据POST _bulk{ "index" : { "_index" : "tehero_index", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "1" } }{ "id" : 1,"content":"关注我,系统学编程" }{ "index" : { "_index" : "tehero_index", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "2" } }{ "id" : 2,"content":"系统学编程,关注我" }{ "index" : { "_index" : "tehero_index", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "3" } }{ "id" : 3,"content":"系统编程,关注我" }{ "index" : { "_index" : "tehero_index", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "4" } }{ "id" : 4,"content":"关注我,间隔系统学编程" } 执行查询 123456789# DSL 语句GET /tehero_index/_doc/_search{ "query":{ "match":{ "content.ik_smart_analyzer":"系统编程" } }} DSL执行过程 match_all 查询所有 最简单的查询，它匹配所有文档，所有的_score都是 1.0 123456789101112131415# DSL 查询GET /procucts/_doc/_search{ "query": { "match_all": {} }}# 简化写法GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "match_all": {} }} 响应 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243{ "took" : 2, // 响应耗时 "timed_out" : false, // 是否超时 "_shards" : { // 分片信息 "total" : 1, // 搜索的分片总数 "successful" : 1, // 搜索成功的分片数量 "skipped" : 0, // 没有搜索的分片，跳过的分片 "failed" : 0 // 搜索失败的分片数量 }, "hits" : { // 搜索结果集。项目中，我们需要的一切数据都是从hits中获取 "total" : { // 返回多少条数据 "value" : 2, // 数量 "relation" : "eq" // eq时为准确计数，当为gte时，value是不准确计数 }, "max_score" : 1.0, // 返回结果中，最大的匹配度分值 "hits" : [ // 默认查询前十条数据，根据分值降序排序 { "_index" : "procucts", // 索引名称 "_type" : "_doc", // 类型名称 "_id" : "_J3PgIAB_jzT9lCXUHcj", // 该条数据的id "_score" : 1.0, // 关键字与该条数据的匹配度分值 "_source" : { // 索引库中类型，返回结果字段，不指定的话，默认全部显示出来 "title" : "iphone12", "price" : 5999, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "八折销售" } }, { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "2", "_score" : 1.0, "_source" : { "title" : "pihone13 256g", "price" : 7999, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "新上市" } } ] }} multi_match 多字段查询 注意: 字段类型分词,将查询条件分词之后进行查询该字段 如果该字段不分词就会将查询条件作为整体进行查询 text：会将query 条件进行分词后查询 keyword：整体等值查询 这个查询是ES使用最多的查询 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768# multi_matchGET /procucts/_search{ "query": {"multi_match": { "query": "新空", "fields": ["title", "description"] }}}结果：{ "took" : 1, "timed_out" : false, "_shards" : { "total" : 1, "successful" : 1, "skipped" : 0, "failed" : 0 }, "hits" : { "total" : { "value" : 3, "relation" : "eq" }, "max_score" : 2.180687, "hits" : [ { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "11", "_score" : 2.180687, "_source" : { "title" : "格力空调", "price" : 2599, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "新型节能空调" } }, { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "10", "_score" : 1.4816045, "_source" : { "title" : "空调", "price" : 2199, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "格力空调" } }, { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "2", "_score" : 1.2755904, "_source" : { "title" : "pihone13 256g", "price" : 7399, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "新上市" } } ] }}能搜索出结果肯定不是title的功劳，是description分词后的查询的结果。query将 “新空” 分词为 “新”和“空”，然后分词查询将包含“新”和“空”的description数据查询出来 match_phrase 短语查询 match_phrase_prefix 短语前缀查询 term 精准查询 term 精准查询 text: 默认使用标准分词器查询（除了text类型，其他数据类型都不分词） keyword: 不分词查询 标准分词器：ES默认分词器，中文单字分词，英文单词分词 keyword 等值精准查询 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445# term 精准查询# title 是 keyword 类型，必须精准匹配GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "term": { "title": { "value": "iphone13 128g" } } }}返回：{ "took" : 1, "timed_out" : false, "_shards" : { "total" : 1, "successful" : 1, "skipped" : 0, "failed" : 0 }, "hits" : { "total" : { "value" : 1, "relation" : "eq" }, "max_score" : 1.3862942, "hits" : [ { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "1", "_score" : 1.3862942, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone13 128g", "price" : 6399, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "降价大促销" } } ] }} text 分词精准查询 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970717273# 分词精准查询# description 是text类型GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "term": { "description": { "value": "降" } } }}返回：{ "took" : 0, "timed_out" : false, "_shards" : { "total" : 1, "successful" : 1, "skipped" : 0, "failed" : 0 }, "hits" : { "total" : { "value" : 2, "relation" : "eq" }, "max_score" : 0.7753091, "hits" : [ { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "1", "_score" : 0.7753091, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone13 128g", "price" : 6399, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "降价大促销" } }, { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "5", "_score" : 0.7753091, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone11", "price" : 6399, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "降价大促销", "tag" : "清仓" } } ] }}# text 使用标准分词，中文单字分词# 所以查询条件为 降价 则查询不了GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "term": { "description": { "value": "降价" } } }} terms 多值查询 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071# terms 多值查询GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "terms": { "price": [ 5999, 6399 ] } }}返回{ "took" : 48, "timed_out" : false, "_shards" : { "total" : 1, "successful" : 1, "skipped" : 0, "failed" : 0 }, "hits" : { "total" : { "value" : 3, "relation" : "eq" }, "max_score" : 1.0, "hits" : [ { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "_J3PgIAB_jzT9lCXUHcj", "_score" : 1.0, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone12", "price" : 5999, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "八折销售" } }, { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "1", "_score" : 1.0, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone13 128g", "price" : 6399, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "降价大促销" } }, { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "5", "_score" : 1.0, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone11", "price" : 6399, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "降价大促销", "tag" : "清仓" } } ] }} range 范围查询 range 关键字: 用来指定查询指定范围内的文档 123456789101112131415161718192021222324GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "range": { "price": { "gte": 5000, "lte": 6000 } } }}# 日期范围GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "range": { "create_date": { "gte": "2022-05-01", "lte": "2022-05-03" } } }} prefix 前缀查询 prefix 关键字: 用来检索含有指定前缀的关键词的相关文档 text类型需要分词前缀，比如中文的前缀只能一个汉字（默认分词器） 12345678910GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "prefix": { "title": { "value": "iphone" } } }} text 12345678910GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "prefix": { "description": { "value": "降" } } }} wildcard 通配符查询 wildcard 关键字: 通配符查询 text类型需要分词前缀，比如中文的通配只能一个汉字（默认分词器） ?：用来匹配一个任意字符 *****：用来匹配多个任意字符 1234567891011121314151617181920212223# 匹配一个字符GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "wildcard": { "title": { "value": "iphone13 128?" } } }}# 匹配多个字符GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "wildcard": { "title": { "value": "iphone*" } } }} text 12345678910GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "wildcard": { "description": { "value": "降*" } } }} ids 多id查询 ids 关键字 : 值为数组类型,用来根据一组id获取多个对应的文档 12345678GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "ids": { "values": [1,2,3,4,5] } }} fuzzy 模糊查询 fuzzy 关键字: 用来模糊查询含有指定关键字的文档 注意: fuzzy 模糊查询 最大模糊错误 必须在0-2之间 搜索关键词长度为 2 不允许存在模糊 搜索关键词长度为3-5 允许一次模糊 搜索关键词长度大于5 允许最大2模糊 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869# 模糊查询POST /procucts/_doc/_bulk {"index": {"_id": "10"}} {"title": "空调","price": 2199,"create_date":"2022-05-02","description":"格力空调"} {"index": {"_id": "11"}} {"title": "格力空调","price": 2599,"create_date":"2022-05-02","description":"新型节能空调"} {"index": {"_id": "12"}} {"title": "舒适空调被子","price": 299,"create_date":"2022-05-02","description":"夏天首选"}# 搜索关键词长度为 2 不允许存在模糊GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "fuzzy": { "title": { "value": "空空" } } }}# 搜索关键词长度为3-5 允许一次模糊GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "fuzzy": { "title": { "value": "格力空空" } } }}GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "fuzzy": { "title": { "value": "格力空" } } }}# 搜索出格力空调# 搜索关键词长度大于5 允许最大2模糊GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "fuzzy": { "title": { "value": "舒适空调被" } } }}GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "fuzzy": { "title": { "value": "舒适空调测试" } } }}# 搜索出 舒适空调被子 bool 布尔查询 ​ 布尔查询是最常用的组合查询，不仅将多个查询条件组合在一起，并且将查询的结果和结果的评分组合在一起。当查询条件是多个表达式的组合时，布尔查询非常有用，实际上，布尔查询把多个子查询组合（combine）成一个布尔表达式，所有子查询之间的逻辑关系是与（and）；只有当一个文档满足布尔查询中的所有子查询条件时，ElasticSearch引擎才认为该文档满足查询条件。布尔查询支持的子查询类型共有四种，分别是：must，should，must_not和filter && must 相当于&& , 多个条件必须同时成立 1234567891011121314151617181920212223# must 多个条件成立GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "bool": { "must": [ {"term": { "title": { "value": "iphone13 128g" } }}, { "range": { "price": { "gte": 5000, "lte": 9999 } } } ] } }} || should 相当于||， 多个条件成立一个就可以 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "bool": { "should": [ { "term": { "title": { "value": "iphone13 128g" } } }, { "term": { "id": { "value": "2" } } } ] } }}结果：{ "took" : 1, "timed_out" : false, "_shards" : { "total" : 1, "successful" : 1, "skipped" : 0, "failed" : 0 }, "hits" : { "total" : { "value" : 1, "relation" : "eq" }, "max_score" : 2.9924302, "hits" : [ { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "1", "_score" : 2.9924302, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone13 128g", "price" : 6399, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "降价大促销" } } ] }} ! must_not 表示取反 12345678910111213141516# must_not# 查询id!=1的数据GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "bool": { "must_not": [ {"term": { "id": { "value": "1" } }} ] } }} query_string 默认字段分词查询 注意: 查询字段分词(text)就将查询条件分词查询 查询字段不分词将查询条件不分词查询 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667# query_stringGET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "query_string": { "default_field": "description", "query": "空调夏天" } }}结果：{ "took" : 1, "timed_out" : false, "_shards" : { "total" : 1, "successful" : 1, "skipped" : 0, "failed" : 0 }, "hits" : { "total" : { "value" : 3, "relation" : "eq" }, "max_score" : 2.963209, "hits" : [ { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "10", "_score" : 2.963209, "_source" : { "title" : "空调", "price" : 2199, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "格力空调" } }, { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "12", "_score" : 2.963209, "_source" : { "title" : "舒适空调被子", "price" : 299, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "夏天首选" } }, { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "11", "_score" : 2.4600224, "_source" : { "title" : "格力空调", "price" : 2599, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "新型节能空调" } } ] }} highlight 高亮查询 highlight 关键字: 可以让符合条件的文档中的关键词高亮，ES7后只有能分词的字段能高亮 自定义高亮html标签: 可以在highlight中使用pre_tags和post_tags 多字段高亮: 使用require_field_match开启多个字段高亮 所有字段高亮："*":{} 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071727374757677787980818283848586878889GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "query_string": { "default_field": "description", "query": "空调夏天" } }, "highlight": { "pre_tags": ["<span color='red'>"], "post_tags": ["</span>"], "require_field_match": "false", "fields": { "description": {} } }}返回：{ "took" : 10, "timed_out" : false, "_shards" : { "total" : 1, "successful" : 1, "skipped" : 0, "failed" : 0 }, "hits" : { "total" : { "value" : 3, "relation" : "eq" }, "max_score" : 2.963209, "hits" : [ { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "10", "_score" : 2.963209, "_source" : { "title" : "空调", "price" : 2199, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "格力空调" }, "highlight" : { "description" : [ "格力<span color='red'>空</span><span color='red'>调</span>" ] } }, { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "12", "_score" : 2.963209, "_source" : { "title" : "舒适空调被子", "price" : 299, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "夏天首选" }, "highlight" : { "description" : [ "<span color='red'>夏</span><span color='red'>天</span>首选" ] } }, { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "11", "_score" : 2.4600224, "_source" : { "title" : "格力空调", "price" : 2599, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "新型节能空调" }, "highlight" : { "description" : [ "新型节能<span color='red'>空</span><span color='red'>调</span>" ] } } ] }} limi size 返回指定条数 size 关键字: 指定查询结果中返回指定条数。 默认返回值10条 1234567GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "match_all": {} }, "size": 2} form 分页查询 from 关键字: 用来指定起始返回位置，和size关键字连用可实现分页效果 **from：**相当于mysql的 offset size： 相当于mysql的 limit 12345678GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "match_all": {} }, "from": 2, "size": 2} sort 指定字段排序 注意 ：干扰了ES的查询，所有自定义排序查询是没有打分的 12345678910111213GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "match_all": {} }, "sort": [ { "price": { "order": "desc" } } ]} _source 返回指定字段 _source 关键字: 是一个数组,在数组中用来指定展示那些字段，和mysql查询指定返回哪些字段一样 1234567GET /procucts/_search{ "query": { "match_all": {} }, "_source": ["title"]} Filter Query 过滤查询 ​ 过滤查询filter query，其实准确来说，ES中的查询操作分为2种: 查询(query)和过滤(filter)。查询即是之前提到的query查询，它 (查询)默认会计算每个返回文档的得分，然后根据得分排序。而过滤(filter)只会筛选出符合的文档，并不计算 得分，而且它可以缓存文档 。所以，单从性能考虑，过滤比查询更快。 换句话说 过滤适合在大范围筛选数据，而查询则适合精确匹配数据。一般应用时， 应先使用过滤操作过滤数据， 然后使用查询匹配数据。 ​ 在电商领域搜索商品的时候，关键词是分词查询（query），价格区间、品牌等是通过过滤（filter）筛选的 注意：filte query必须配合布尔查询一起使用 term-level-queries 官方术语查询文档 使用 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930# 初始化映射PUT /goods{ "mappings": { "properties": { "title": { "type": "keyword" }, "price": { "type": "double" }, "created_at": { "type": "date" }, "description": { "type": "text", "analyzer": "ik_max_word" } } }}# 初始化数据POST /goods/_bulk{"index": {"_id": 1}} {"title": "iphone12", "price": 5888, "created_at": "2022-05-04", "description": "降价降价清仓大甩卖"}{"index": {"_id": 2}} {"title": "iphone13", "price": 6888, "created_at": "2022-05-05", "description": "八折促销降价"}{"index": {"_id": 3}} {"title": "iphone13 pro", "price": 8888, "created_at": "2022-05-06", "description": "预售降价销售"} term 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556POST /goods/_search{ "query":{ "bool":{ "must":[ { "term":{ "description":{ "value":"降价" } } } ], "filter":[ { "term": { "description": "八折" } } ] } }}#结果：{ "took" : 0, "timed_out" : false, "_shards" : { "total" : 1, "successful" : 1, "skipped" : 0, "failed" : 0 }, "hits" : { "total" : { "value" : 1, "relation" : "eq" }, "max_score" : 0.12562492, "hits" : [ { "_index" : "goods", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "2", "_score" : 0.12562492, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone13", "price" : 6888, "created_at" : "2022-05-05", "description" : "八折促销降价" } } ] }} terms 类似于mysql的 in 查询 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526POST /goods/_search{ "query":{ "bool":{ "must":[ { "term":{ "description":{ "value":"降价" } } } ], "filter":[ { "terms": { "description": [ "八折", "预售" ] } } ] } }} range 类似mysql 的 between 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859POST /goods/_search{ "query":{ "bool":{ "must":[ { "term":{ "description":{ "value":"降价" } } } ], "filter":[ { "range": { "price": { "gte": 5000, "lte": 6000 } } } ] } }}#结果：{ "took" : 0, "timed_out" : false, "_shards" : { "total" : 1, "successful" : 1, "skipped" : 0, "failed" : 0 }, "hits" : { "total" : { "value" : 1, "relation" : "eq" }, "max_score" : 0.17599069, "hits" : [ { "_index" : "goods", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "1", "_score" : 0.17599069, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone12", "price" : 5888, "created_at" : "2022-05-04", "description" : "降价降价清仓大甩卖" } } ] }} exists 过滤存在指定字段,获取字段不为空的索引记录使用，类似mysql里的 is not null 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071727374757677787980POST /goods/_search{ "query":{ "bool":{ "must":[ { "term":{ "description":{ "value":"降价" } } } ], "filter":[ { "exists": { "field": "description" } } ] } }}#结果：{ "took" : 3, "timed_out" : false, "_shards" : { "total" : 1, "successful" : 1, "skipped" : 0, "failed" : 0 }, "hits" : { "total" : { "value" : 3, "relation" : "eq" }, "max_score" : 0.17599069, "hits" : [ { "_index" : "goods", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "1", "_score" : 0.17599069, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone12", "price" : 5888, "created_at" : "2022-05-04", "description" : "降价降价清仓大甩卖" } }, { "_index" : "goods", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "3", "_score" : 0.15275992, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone13 pro", "price" : 8888, "created_at" : "2022-05-06", "description" : "预售降价销售" } }, { "_index" : "goods", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "2", "_score" : 0.12562492, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone13", "price" : 6888, "created_at" : "2022-05-05", "description" : "八折促销降价" } } ] }} ids 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778POST /goods/_search{ "query":{ "bool":{ "must":[ { "match_all": {} } ], "filter":[ { "ids": { "values": [ 1,2,3 ] } } ] } }}# 结果：{ "took" : 0, "timed_out" : false, "_shards" : { "total" : 1, "successful" : 1, "skipped" : 0, "failed" : 0 }, "hits" : { "total" : { "value" : 3, "relation" : "eq" }, "max_score" : 1.0, "hits" : [ { "_index" : "goods", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "1", "_score" : 1.0, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone12", "price" : 5888, "created_at" : "2022-05-04", "description" : "降价降价清仓大甩卖" } }, { "_index" : "goods", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "2", "_score" : 1.0, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone13", "price" : 6888, "created_at" : "2022-05-05", "description" : "八折促销降价" } }, { "_index" : "goods", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "3", "_score" : 1.0, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone13 pro", "price" : 8888, "created_at" : "2022-05-06", "description" : "预售降价销售" } } ] }} *query和filter的区别 聚合查询 Text类型不支持聚合 聚合查询中如果不希望返回hits数据，可以在请求url加上参数?from=0&size=0 Metrics aggregations 指标聚合 指标指的是对文档进行统计计算方式，又叫指标聚合，就是类似SQL的统计函数，指标聚合可以单独使用，也可以跟桶聚合一起使用 max min sum avg 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970717273#maxGET /goods/_search{ "aggs": { "max_price": { "max": { "field": "price" } } }}返回:{ "took" : 41, "timed_out" : false, "_shards" : { "total" : 1, "successful" : 1, "skipped" : 0, "failed" : 0 }, "hits" : { "total" : { "value" : 1, "relation" : "eq" }, "max_score" : 1.0, "hits" : [ { "_index" : "goods", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "1", "_score" : 1.0, "_source" : { "title" : "小米手机", "price" : "1999", "created_at" : "2020-05-06", "description" : "这是一个好手机" } } ] }, "aggregations" : { "max_price" : { "value" : 1999.0 } }}#sumGET /goods/_search{ "aggs": { "max_price": { "sum": { "field": "price" } } }}返回：{ ... "aggregations" : { "max_price" : { "value" : 1999.0 } }} value count 值统计 Value Count，值计数聚合。计算聚合文档中某个值（可以是特定的数值型字段，也可以通过脚本计算而来）的个数。该聚合一般域其它 single-value 聚合联合使用，比如在计算一个字段的平均值的时候，可能还会关注这个平均值是由多少个值计算而来 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930GET /goods/_search?from=0&size=0{ "aggs": { "max_price": { "sum": { "field": "price" } }, "count_num": { "value_count": { "field": "price" } } }}#返回：{... "aggregations" : { "count_num" : { "value" : 1 }, "max_price" : { "value" : 1999.0 } }}其中count_num表示了max_price是从多少个值中聚合而来的 cardinality 基数聚合 Cardinality，基数聚合。它属于multi-value，基于文档的某个值（可以是特定的字段，也可以通过脚本计算而来），计算文档非重复的个数（去重计数），相当于sql中的distinct 1234567891011121314151617181920GET /goods/_search?from=0&size=0{ "aggs": { "distinct": { "cardinality": { "field": "price" } } }}返回：{... "aggregations" : { "distinct" : { "value" : 1 } }} stats 统计聚合 Stats，统计聚合。它属于multi-value，基于文档的某个值（可以是特定的数值型字段，也可以通过脚本计算而来），计算出一些统计信息（min、max、sum、count、avg5个值 123456789101112131415161718192021222324GET /goods/_search?from=0&size=0{ "aggs": { "stats_price": { "stats": { "field": "price" } } }}#返回{... "aggregations" : { "stats_price" : { "count" : 1, "min" : 1999.0, "max" : 1999.0, "avg" : 1999.0, "sum" : 1999.0 } }} extended stats 拓展的统计聚合 Extended Stats，扩展统计聚合。它属于multi-value，比stats多4个统计结果： 平方和、方差、标准差、平均值加/减两个标准差的区间 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738GET /goods/_search{ "aggs": { "extended": { "extended_stats": { "field": "price" } } }}返回：{... "aggregations" : { "extended" : { "count" : 1, "min" : 1999.0, "max" : 1999.0, "avg" : 1999.0, "sum" : 1999.0, "sum_of_squares" : 3996001.0, "variance" : 0.0, "variance_population" : 0.0, "variance_sampling" : "NaN", "std_deviation" : 0.0, "std_deviation_population" : 0.0, "std_deviation_sampling" : "NaN", "std_deviation_bounds" : { "upper" : 1999.0, "lower" : 1999.0, "upper_population" : 1999.0, "lower_population" : 1999.0, "upper_sampling" : "NaN", "lower_sampling" : "NaN" } } } percentile 百分比统计 Percentiles ，百分比聚合。一种multi-value度量聚合，它计算从聚合文档中提取的数值的一个或多个百分位数。这些值可以从文档中的特定数字或直方图字段中提取。百分位数显示观察值出现一定百分比的点。例如，第 95 个百分位是大于 95% 的观测值的值 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728GET /procucts/_search?from=0&size=0{ "aggs": { "extended": { "percentiles": { "field": "price" } } }}返回：{... "aggregations" : { "extended" : { "values" : { "1.0" : 299.0, "5.0" : 299.0, "25.0" : 2399.0, "50.0" : 6199.0, "75.0" : 6899.0, "95.0" : 8399.0, "99.0" : 8399.0 } } }} top hits 热门点击聚合 Top Hits，最高匹配权值聚合。获取到每组前n条数据，相当于sql 中Top（group by 后取出前n条）。它跟踪聚合中相关性最高的文档，该聚合一般用做 sub-aggregation，以此来聚合每个桶中的最高匹配的文档，较为常用的统计 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556GET /procucts/_search?from=0&size=0{ "aggs": { "term": { "terms": { "field": "price", "size": 10 }, "aggs": { "top_val": { "top_hits": { "size": 1 } } } } }}返回：{ ... "aggregations" : { "term" : { "doc_count_error_upper_bound" : 0, "sum_other_doc_count" : 0, "buckets" : [ { "key" : 6399.0, "doc_count" : 2, "top_val" : { "hits" : { "total" : { "value" : 2, # 分组检索到2个文档 "relation" : "eq" }, "max_score" : 1.0, "hits" : [ # 只返回第一个 { "_index" : "procucts", "_type" : "_doc", "_id" : "1", "_score" : 1.0, "_source" : { "title" : "iphone13 128g", "price" : 6399, "create_date" : "2022-05-02", "description" : "降价大促销" } } ] } } } ... } geo bounds 地理边界聚合 Geo Bounds，地理边界聚合。基于文档的某个字段（geo-point类型字段），计算出该字段所有地理坐标点的边界（左上角/右下角坐标点 geo centroid 地理重心聚合 Geo Centroid，地理重心聚合。基于文档的某个字段（geo-point类型字段），计算所有坐标的加权重心 Bucket aggregations 桶聚合 满足特定条件的文档的集合，叫做桶 桶的就是一组数据的集合，对数据分组后，得到一组组的数据，就是一个个的桶 ES中桶聚合，指的就是先对数据进行分组，ES支持多种分组条件，例如：支持类似SQL的group by根据字段分组，当然ES比SQL更强大，支持更多的分组条件，以满足各种统计需求 terms 词聚合 Terms，词聚合。基于某个field，该 field 内的每一个【唯一词元】为一个桶，并计算每个桶内文档个数。默认返回顺序是按照文档个数多少排序。它属于multi-bucket。当不返回所有 buckets 的情况（它size控制），文档个数可能不准确 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839GET /procucts/_search?from=0&size=0{ "aggs": { "term": { "terms": { "field": "price", "size": 3, "order": { "_count": "asc“ # 还有很多可选参数查看官方文档 } } } }}返回：{ ... "aggregations" : { "term" : { "doc_count_error_upper_bound" : 0, "sum_other_doc_count" : 0, "buckets" : [ { "key" : 299.0, "doc_count" : 1 }, { "key" : 2199.0, "doc_count" : 1 }, { "key" : 2599.0, "doc_count" : 1 } ] } }} filter 过滤聚合 Filter，过滤聚合。基于一个条件，来对当前的文档进行过滤的聚合 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334GET /procucts/_search?from=0&size=0{ "aggs": { "filter_val": { "filter": { # 先过滤 "term": { "price": 7399 } }, "aggs": { # 再聚合 "avg_price": { "avg": { "field": "price" } } } } }}返回：{ ... "aggregations" : { "filter_val" : { "doc_count" : 1, "avg_price" : { "value" : 7399.0 } } }} filters 多过滤聚合 Filters，多过滤聚合。基于多个过滤条件，来对当前文档进行【过滤】的聚合，每个过滤都包含所有满足它的文档（多个bucket中可能重复），先过滤再聚合。它属于multi-bucket 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738GET /procucts/_search?from=0&size=0{ "aggs": { "filters_val": { "filters": { "filters": { "price": { "term": { "price": "7399" } }, "create_at": { "term": { "create_date": "2022-05-02" } } } } } }}返回:{ ... "aggregations" : { "filters_val" : { "buckets" : { "create_at" : { "doc_count" : 8 #8个文档的创建时间是 2022-05-0 }, "price" : { "doc_count" : 1 #一个文档的价格是7399 } } } }} range范围聚合 Range，范围分组聚合。基于某个值（可以是 field 或 script），以【字段范围】来桶分聚合。范围聚合包括 from 值，不包括 to 值（区间前闭后开）。它属于multi-bucket 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152GET /procucts/_search?from=0&size=0{ "aggs": { "range_val": { "range": { "field": "price", "ranges": [ // 支持多rang查询 { "key": "low", "from": 0, "to": 2000 }, { "from": 2000, "to": 5000 }, { "from": 5000 } ] } } }}返回：{... "aggregations" : { "range_val" : { "buckets" : [ { "key" : "low", "from" : 0.0, "to" : 2000.0, "doc_count" : 1 }, { "key" : "2000.0-5000.0", "from" : 2000.0, "to" : 5000.0, "doc_count" : 2 }, { "key" : "5000.0-*", "from" : 5000.0, "doc_count" : 5 } ] } }} date range 时间范围聚合 Date Range，日期范围聚合。基于日期类型的值，以【日期范围】来桶分聚合。期范围可以用各种 Date Math 表达式。同样的，包括 from 的值，不包括 to 的值（区间前闭后开）。它属于multi-bucket 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445GET /procucts/_search?from=0&size=0{ "aggs": { "data_range_val": { "date_range": { "field": "create_date", "format": "yyyy-MM-dd", # 指定时间格式 "ranges": [ { "from": "2022-05-01", "to": "2022-05-03" }, { "from": "2022-05-20" } ] } } }}返回：{... "aggregations" : { "data_range_val" : { "buckets" : [ { "key" : "2022-05-01-2022-05-03", "from" : 1.6513632E12, "from_as_string" : "2022-05-01", "to" : 1.651536E12, "to_as_string" : "2022-05-03", "doc_count" : 8 }, { "key" : "2022-05-20-*", "from" : 1.6530048E12, "from_as_string" : "2022-05-20", "doc_count" : 0 } ] } }} histogram 时间柱状聚合 你要先了解下Histogram，直方图聚合。基于文档中的某个【数值类型】字段，通过计算来动态的分桶。它属于multi-bucket 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051GET /procucts/_search?from=0&size=0{ "aggs": { "view": { "histogram": { "field": "price", // 聚合字段 "interval": 1000, // 分桶间隔 "min_doc_count": 1, // 最少文档数桶过滤，只有不少于这么多文档的桶才会返回 "extended_bounds": { // 范围扩展 "min": 0, "max": 50 } } } }}返回:{... "aggregations" : { "view" : { "buckets" : [ { "key" : 0.0, "doc_count" : 1 }, { "key" : 2000.0, "doc_count" : 2 }, { "key" : 5000.0, "doc_count" : 1 }, { "key" : 6000.0, "doc_count" : 2 }, { "key" : 7000.0, "doc_count" : 1 }, { "key" : 8000.0, "doc_count" : 1 } ] } }} missing 缺失值的聚合 Missing，基于字段数据的单桶聚合，它创建一个包含当前文档集上下文中缺少字段值的所有文档的桶（实际上，缺少字段或具有配置的 NULL 值集）。此聚合器通常与其他字段数据桶聚合器（例如范围）结合使用，以返回由于缺少字段数据值而无法放入任何其他桶中的所有文档的信息 1234567891011121314151617181920GET /procucts/_search?from=0&size=0{ "aggs": { "miss_val": { "missing": { "field": "price" } } }}返回：{... "aggregations" : { "miss_val" : { "doc_count" : 0 } }} ip range IP范围聚合 IP Range，基于一个 IPv4 字段，对文档进行【IPv4范围】的桶分聚合。和 Range Aggregation 类似，只是应用字段必须是 IPv4 数据类型。它属于multi-bucket 123456789101112131415GET /ip_addresses/_search{ "size": 10, "aggs": { "ip_ranges": { "ip_range": { "field": "ip", "ranges": [ { "to": "10.0.0.5" }, { "from": "10.0.0.5" } ] } } }} nested 嵌套聚合 nested, 主要用户nested嵌套类型数据聚合 Pipeline aggregations 管道聚合 Pipeline，管道聚合。它对其它聚合操作的输出（桶或者桶的某些权值）及其关联指标进行聚合，而不是文档，是一种后期对每个分桶的一些计算操作。管道聚合的作用是为输出增加一些有用信息 管道聚合不能包含子聚合，但是某些类型的管道聚合可以链式使用（比如计算导数的导数） 管道聚合大致分为两类 parent，它输入是其【父聚合】的输出，并对其进行进一步处理。一般不生成新的桶，而是对父聚合桶信息的增强 sibling，它输入是其【兄弟聚合】的输出。并能在同级上计算新的聚合 管道聚合通过 buckets_path 参数指定他们要进行聚合计算的权值对象，bucket_path语法 聚合分隔符 = “>”， 指定父子聚合关系，如：“my_bucket>my_stats.avg” 权值分隔符= “.”， 指定聚合的特定权值 聚合名称 = ， 直接指定聚合的名称 权值 = ， 直接指定权值 完整路径 = agg_name[> agg_name]*[. metrics] ， 综合利用上面的方式指定完整路径 特殊值 = “_count”， 输入的文档个数 特殊情况 要进行 pipeline aggregation 聚合的对象名称或权值名称包含小数点，“buckets_path”: “my_percentile[99.9]” 处理对象中包含空桶（无文档的桶分），参数 gap_policy，可选值有 skip、insert_zeros Derivative 导数聚合 导数 Derivative，求导聚合。基于父聚合（只能是histogram或date_histogram类型）的某个权值，对权值求导。用于求导的权值必须是数值类型。封闭直方图（histogram）聚合的 min_doc_count 必须是 0 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344454647484950515253545556575859606162636465666768697071727374757677787980818283GET /procucts/_search?from=0&size=0{ "aggs": { "price_range": { # 桶聚合 "histogram": { "field": "price", "interval": 2000, "min_doc_count": 0 }, "aggs": { # 指标聚合 "sum_price": { "sum": { "field": "price" } }, "price_deriv": { "derivative": { "buckets_path": "sum_price" # 获取父聚合数据再计算导出聚合 } } } } }}返回：{... "aggregations" : { "price_range" : { "buckets" : [ { "key" : 0.0, "doc_count" : 1, "sum_price" : { "value" : 299.0 } }, { "key" : 2000.0, "doc_count" : 2, "sum_price" : { "value" : 4798.0 }, "price_deriv" : { "value" : 4499.0 } }, { "key" : 4000.0, "doc_count" : 1, "sum_price" : { "value" : 5999.0 }, "price_deriv" : { "value" : 1201.0 } }, { "key" : 6000.0, "doc_count" : 3, "sum_price" : { "value" : 20197.0 }, "price_deriv" : { "value" : 14198.0 } }, { "key" : 8000.0, "doc_count" : 1, "sum_price" : { "value" : 8399.0 }, "price_deriv" : { "value" : -11798.0 } } ] } }} 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829POST /sales/_search{ "size": 0, "aggs": { "sales_per_month": { "date_histogram": { "field": "date", "calendar_interval": "month" }, "aggs": { "sales": { "sum": { "field": "price" } }, "sales_deriv": { # 父导合，父是sales "derivative": { "buckets_path": "sales" } }, "sales_2nd_deriv": { "derivative": { "buckets_path": "sales_deriv" # 兄弟聚合，兄弟是sales_deriv (同层级) } } } } }} moving average 窗口平均数聚合 Moving Average，窗口平均值聚合。基于已经排序过的数据，计算出处在当前出口中数据的平均值。比如窗口大小为 5 ，对数据 1—10 的部分窗口平均值如下： (1 + 2 + 3 + 4 + 5) / 5 = 3 (2 + 3 + 4 + 5 + 6) / 5 = 4 (3 + 4 + 5 + 6 + 7) / 5 = 5 etc 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081GET /procucts/_search?from=0&size=0{ "aggs": { "price_range": { "histogram": { "field": "price", "interval": 2000 }, "aggs": { "sum_price": { "sum": { "field": "price" } }, "the_movavg": { "moving_avg": { "buckets_path": "sum_price" } } } } }}返回：{... "aggregations" : { "price_range" : { "buckets" : [ { "key" : 0.0, "doc_count" : 1, "sum_price" : { "value" : 299.0 } }, { "key" : 2000.0, "doc_count" : 2, "sum_price" : { "value" : 4798.0 }, "the_movavg" : { "value" : 299.0 } }, { "key" : 4000.0, "doc_count" : 1, "sum_price" : { "value" : 5999.0 }, "the_movavg" : { "value" : 2548.5 } }, { "key" : 6000.0, "doc_count" : 3, "sum_price" : { "value" : 20197.0 }, "the_movavg" : { "value" : 3698.6666666666665 } }, { "key" : 8000.0, "doc_count" : 1, "sum_price" : { "value" : 8399.0 }, "the_movavg" : { "value" : 7823.25 } } ] } }} bucket script 桶脚本聚合 Bucket Script，桶脚本聚合。基于父聚合的【一个或多个权值】，对这些权值通过脚本进行运算。用于计算的父聚合必须是多桶聚合。用于计算的权值必须是数值类型。执行脚本必须要返回数值型结果 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081828384858687888990919293949596979899100101102103104105106107POST /sales/_search{ "size": 0, "aggs": { "sales_per_month": { "date_histogram": { "field": "date", "calendar_interval": "month" }, "aggs": { "total_sales": { "sum": { "field": "price" } }, "t-shirts": { "filter": { "term": { "type": "t-shirt" } }, "aggs": { "sales": { "sum": { "field": "price" } } } }, "t-shirt-percentage": { "bucket_script": { "buckets_path": { "tShirtSales": "t-shirts>sales", "totalSales": "total_sales" }, "script": "params.tShirtSales / params.totalSales * 100" } } } } }}返回：{ "took": 11, "timed_out": false, "_shards": ..., "hits": ..., "aggregations": { "sales_per_month": { "buckets": [ { "key_as_string": "2015/01/01 00:00:00", "key": 1420070400000, "doc_count": 3, "total_sales": { "value": 550.0 }, "t-shirts": { "doc_count": 1, "sales": { "value": 200.0 } }, "t-shirt-percentage": { "value": 36.36363636363637 } }, { "key_as_string": "2015/02/01 00:00:00", "key": 1422748800000, "doc_count": 2, "total_sales": { "value": 60.0 }, "t-shirts": { "doc_count": 1, "sales": { "value": 10.0 } }, "t-shirt-percentage": { "value": 16.666666666666664 } }, { "key_as_string": "2015/03/01 00:00:00", "key": 1425168000000, "doc_count": 2, "total_sales": { "value": 375.0 }, "t-shirts": { "doc_count": 1, "sales": { "value": 175.0 } }, "t-shirt-percentage": { "value": 46.666666666666664 } } ] } }} bucket selector 桶选择器聚合 Bucket Selector，桶选择器聚合。基于父聚合的【一个或多个权值】，通过脚本对权值进行计算，并决定父聚合的哪些桶需要保留，其余的将被丢弃。用于计算的父聚合必须是多桶聚合。用于计算的权值必须是数值类型。运算的脚本必须是返回 boolean 类型，如果脚本是脚本表达式形式给出，那么允许返回数值类型 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657POST /sales/_search{ "size": 0, "aggs": { "sales_per_month": { "date_histogram": { "field": "date", "calendar_interval": "month" }, "aggs": { "total_sales": { "sum": { "field": "price" } }, "sales_bucket_filter": { "bucket_selector": { "buckets_path": { "totalSales": "total_sales" }, "script": "params.totalSales > 200" } } } } }}返回：{ "took": 11, "timed_out": false, "_shards": ..., "hits": ..., "aggregations": { "sales_per_month": { "buckets": [ { "key_as_string": "2015/01/01 00:00:00", "key": 1420070400000, "doc_count": 3, "total_sales": { "value": 550.0 } }, { "key_as_string": "2015/03/01 00:00:00", "key": 1425168000000, "doc_count": 2, "total_sales": { "value": 375.0 } } ] } }} serial differencing 串行差分聚合 查分 Serial Differencing，串行差分聚合。基于父聚合（只能是histogram或date_histogram类型）的某个权值，对权值值进行差分运算，（取时间间隔，后一刻的值减去前一刻的值：f(X) = f(Xt) – f(Xt-n)）。用于计算的父聚合必须是多桶聚合 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425POST /_search{ "size": 0, "aggs": { "my_date_histo": { "date_histogram": { "field": "timestamp", "calendar_interval": "day" }, "aggs": { "the_sum": { "sum": { "field": "lemmings" } }, "thirtieth_difference": { "serial_diff": { "buckets_path": "the_sum", "lag" : 30 } } } } }} average bucket 桶均值聚合 Avg Bucket，桶均值聚合。基于兄弟聚合的某个权值，求所有桶的权值均值。使用规则：用于计算的兄弟聚合必须是多桶聚合。用于计算的权值必须是数值类型 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667POST _search{ "size": 0, "aggs": { "sales_per_month": { "date_histogram": { "field": "date", "calendar_interval": "month" }, "aggs": { "sales": { "sum": { "field": "price" } } } }, "avg_monthly_sales": {// tag::avg-bucket-agg-syntax[] "avg_bucket": { "buckets_path": "sales_per_month>sales", "gap_policy": "skip", "format": "#,##0.00;(#,##0.00)" }// end::avg-bucket-agg-syntax[] } }}返回：{..."aggregations": { "sales_per_month": { "buckets": [ { "key_as_string": "2015/01/01 00:00:00", "key": 1420070400000, "doc_count": 3, "sales": { "value": 550.0 } }, { "key_as_string": "2015/02/01 00:00:00", "key": 1422748800000, "doc_count": 2, "sales": { "value": 60.0 } }, { "key_as_string": "2015/03/01 00:00:00", "key": 1425168000000, "doc_count": 2, "sales": { "value": 375.0 } } ] }, "avg_monthly_sales": { "value": 328.33333333333333, # 计算所有bucket sales 的均值 "value_as_string": "328.33" } }} max bucket 桶最大值聚合 Max Bucket，桶最大值聚合。基于兄弟聚合的某个权值，输出权值最大的那一个桶。使用规则同上 min bucket 桶最小值聚合 Min Bucket，桶最小值聚合。基于兄弟聚合的某个权值，输出权值最小的一个桶。使用规则同上 sum bucket 桶求和聚合 Sum Bucket，桶求和聚合。基于兄弟聚合的权值，对所有桶的权值求和。使用规则同上 stats bucket 桶统计信息聚合 Stats Bucket，桶统计信息聚合。基于兄弟聚合的某个权值，对【桶的信息】进行一些统计学运算（总计多少个桶、所有桶中该权值的最大值、最小等）。用于计算的权值必须是数值类型。用于计算的兄弟聚合必须是多桶聚合类型 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566POST /sales/_search{ "size": 0, "aggs": { "sales_per_month": { "date_histogram": { "field": "date", "calendar_interval": "month" }, "aggs": { "sales": { "sum": { "field": "price" } } } }, "stats_monthly_sales": { "stats_bucket": { "buckets_path": "sales_per_month>sales" } } }}返回：{... "aggregations": { "sales_per_month": { "buckets": [ { "key_as_string": "2015/01/01 00:00:00", "key": 1420070400000, "doc_count": 3, "sales": { "value": 550.0 } }, { "key_as_string": "2015/02/01 00:00:00", "key": 1422748800000, "doc_count": 2, "sales": { "value": 60.0 } }, { "key_as_string": "2015/03/01 00:00:00", "key": 1425168000000, "doc_count": 2, "sales": { "value": 375.0 } } ] }, "stats_monthly_sales": { "count": 3, "min": 60.0, "max": 550.0, "avg": 328.3333333333333, "sum": 985.0 } }} extended stats bucket 扩展桶统计聚合 Extended Stats Bucket，扩展桶统计聚合。基于兄弟聚合的某个权值，对【桶信息】进行一系列统计学计算（比普通的统计聚合多了一些统计值）。用于计算的权值必须是数值类型。用于计算的兄弟聚合必须是多桶聚合类型 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566676869707172737475767778798081POST /sales/_search{ "size": 0, "aggs": { "sales_per_month": { "date_histogram": { "field": "date", "calendar_interval": "month" }, "aggs": { "sales": { "sum": { "field": "price" } } } }, "stats_monthly_sales": { "extended_stats_bucket": { "buckets_path": "sales_per_month>sales" } } }}返回：{... "aggregations": { "sales_per_month": { "buckets": [ { "key_as_string": "2015/01/01 00:00:00", "key": 1420070400000, "doc_count": 3, "sales": { "value": 550.0 } }, { "key_as_string": "2015/02/01 00:00:00", "key": 1422748800000, "doc_count": 2, "sales": { "value": 60.0 } }, { "key_as_string": "2015/03/01 00:00:00", "key": 1425168000000, "doc_count": 2, "sales": { "value": 375.0 } } ] }, "stats_monthly_sales": { "count": 3, "min": 60.0, "max": 550.0, "avg": 328.3333333333333, "sum": 985.0, "sum_of_squares": 446725.0, "variance": 41105.55555555556, "variance_population": 41105.55555555556, "variance_sampling": 61658.33333333334, "std_deviation": 202.74505063146563, "std_deviation_population": 202.74505063146563, "std_deviation_sampling": 248.3109609609156, "std_deviation_bounds": { "upper": 733.8234345962646, "lower": -77.15676792959795, "upper_population" : 733.8234345962646, "lower_population" : -77.15676792959795, "upper_sampling" : 824.9552552551645, "lower_sampling" : -168.28858858849787 } } }} percentiles bucket 桶百分比聚合 Percentiles Bucket ，桶百分比聚合。基于兄弟聚合的某个权值，计算权值的百分比。用于计算的权值必须是数值类型。用于计算的兄弟聚合必须是多桶聚合类型。对百分比的计算是精确的（不像Percentiles Metric聚合是近似值），所以可能会消耗大量内存 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667POST /sales/_search{ "size": 0, "aggs": { "sales_per_month": { "date_histogram": { "field": "date", "calendar_interval": "month" }, "aggs": { "sales": { "sum": { "field": "price" } } } }, "percentiles_monthly_sales": { "percentiles_bucket": { "buckets_path": "sales_per_month>sales", "percents": [ 25.0, 50.0, 75.0 ] } } }}返回：{ ... "aggregations": { "sales_per_month": { "buckets": [ { "key_as_string": "2015/01/01 00:00:00", "key": 1420070400000, "doc_count": 3, "sales": { "value": 550.0 } }, { "key_as_string": "2015/02/01 00:00:00", "key": 1422748800000, "doc_count": 2, "sales": { "value": 60.0 } }, { "key_as_string": "2015/03/01 00:00:00", "key": 1425168000000, "doc_count": 2, "sales": { "value": 375.0 } } ] }, "percentiles_monthly_sales": { "values" : { "25.0": 375.0, "50.0": 375.0, "75.0": 550.0 } } }} 总结，ES默认给 大多数 字段启用 doc values，所以在一些搜索场景大大的节省了内存使用量，但是需要注意的是只有不分词的 string 类型的字段才能使用这种特性。使聚合运行在 not_analyzed 字符串而不是 analyzed 字符串，这样可以有效的利用 doc values 客户端使用 spring boot 官方注解文档 官方文档 ElasticsearchOperations ElasticsearchOperations 客户端 ES7之后不推荐使用了，建议使用REST API 添加maven依赖 1234<dependency> <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId> <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-data-elasticsearch</artifactId></dependency> 配置连接信息 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970717273747576777879808182838485@Configurationpublic class ElasticsearchClientConfig { /** 协议 */ @Value("${elasticsearch.scheme:http}") private String scheme; /** 集群地址，如果有多个用,隔开 */ @Value("${elasticsearch.address:localhost:9200}") private String address; /** 获取连接的超时时间 */ @Value("${elasticsearch.connectionRequestTimeout:5000}") private Integer connectionRequestTimeout; /** Socket 连接超时时间 */ @Value("${elasticsearch.socketTimeout:5000}") private Integer socketTimeout; /** 连接超时时间 */ @Value("${elasticsearch.connectTimeout:5000}") private Integer connectTimeout; /** 最大连接数 */ @Value("${elasticsearch.maxConnectNum:20}") private Integer maxConnectNum; /** 最大路由连接数 */ @Value("${elasticsearch.maxConnectPerRoute:20}") private Integer maxConnectPerRoute; @Bean public RestClientBuilder restClientBuilder() { HttpHost[] hosts = Arrays.stream(address.split(",")) .map(this::makeHttpHost) .filter(Objects::nonNull) .toArray(HttpHost[]::new); RestClientBuilder restClientBuilder = RestClient.builder(hosts); // 设置一个监听器，每次节点出现故障时都会收到通知// restClientBuilder.setFailureListener(new RestClient.FailureListener() {// @Override// public void onFailure(Node node) {//// }// }); // 异步连接数配置 restClientBuilder.setHttpClientConfigCallback(httpClientBuilder -> { httpClientBuilder.setMaxConnTotal(maxConnectNum); httpClientBuilder.setMaxConnPerRoute(maxConnectPerRoute); return httpClientBuilder; }); // 异步连接延时配置 restClientBuilder.setRequestConfigCallback(requestConfigBuilder -> { requestConfigBuilder.setConnectionRequestTimeout(connectionRequestTimeout); requestConfigBuilder.setSocketTimeout(socketTimeout); requestConfigBuilder.setConnectTimeout(connectTimeout); return requestConfigBuilder; }); return restClientBuilder; } @Bean(name = "restHighLevelClient") public RestHighLevelClient restHighLevelClient(RestClientBuilder restClientBuilder) { return new RestHighLevelClient(restClientBuilder); } /** * 根据配置创建HttpHost * @param s * @return */ private HttpHost makeHttpHost(String s) { int flag = s.lastIndexOf(":"); if (flag > 0) { String host = s.substring(0, flag); String port = s.substring(flag + 1); return new HttpHost(host, Integer.parseInt(port), scheme); } return new HttpHost(s); }} 创建实体对应索引 1234567891011121314151617@Data@ToString@Accessors(chain = true)@Document(indexName = "goods")public class Goods { @Id private Integer id; @Field(type = FieldType.Keyword) private String title; @Field(type = FieldType.Float) private Double price; @Field(type = FieldType.Text, analyzer = "ik_max_word") private String description;} 使用 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061@SpringBootTestpublic class OperationsTest { @Autowired private ElasticsearchOperations elasticsearchOperations; /** * 保存和更新 */ @Test public void save() { Goods goods = new Goods() .setId(1) .setTitle("小米手机") .setPrice(2199d) .setDescription("这是一个好手机"); this.elasticsearchOperations.save(goods); } /** * 删除文档 */ @Test public void delete() { Goods goods = new Goods() .setId(1); this.elasticsearchOperations.delete(goods); } /** * 删除所有文档 */ @Test public void deleteAll(){ this.elasticsearchOperations.delete(Query.findAll(), Goods.class); } /** * 查询文档 */ @Test public void query() { Goods goods = this.elasticsearchOperations.get("1", Goods.class); System.out.println(); } @Test public void queryAll() { SearchHits<Goods> search = this.elasticsearchOperations.search(Query.findAll(), Goods.class); search.forEach(x -> { System.out.println(x.getId()); System.out.println(x.getScore()); Goods goods = x.getContent(); System.out.println(goods); }); }} RestHighLevelClient  class RestHighLevelClientTest { // 使用 spring-data-elasticsearch 可以直接注入使用 @Autowired private RestHighLevelClient restHighLevelClient; /** * 创建索引 * PUT /goods * { * "mappings": { * "properties": { * "title": { * "type": "keyword" * }, * "price": { * "type": "double" * }, * "created_at": { * "type": "date" * }, * "description": { * "type": "text", * "analyzer": "ik_max_word" * } * } * } * } */ @Test public void createIndex() throws IOException { // 索引脚本，取mappings对应的部分 String json = "{\n" + " \"properties\": {\n" + " \"title\": {\n" + " \"type\": \"keyword\"\n" + " },\n" + " \"price\": {\n" + " \"type\": \"double\"\n" + " },\n" + " \"created_at\": {\n" + " \"type\": \"date\"\n" + " },\n" + " \"description\": {\n" + " \"type\": \"text\",\n" + " \"analyzer\": \"ik_max_word\"\n" + " }\n" + " }\n" + " }"; // 创建索引请求 CreateIndexRequest createIndexRequest = new CreateIndexRequest("goods"); // 指定索引映射 createIndexRequest.mapping(json, XContentType.JSON); CreateIndexResponse createIndexResponse = this.restHighLevelClient.indices().create(createIndexRequest, RequestOptions.DEFAULT); System.out.println(createIndexResponse.isAcknowledged()); } /** * 索引文档，添加数据 * PUT /goods/_doc/1 * { * "title":"小米手机", * "price":"1999", * "created_at":"2020-05-06", * "description":"这是一个好手机" * } */ @Test public void index() throws IOException { // 文档内容 String json = "{\n" + " \"title\":\"小米手机\",\n" + " \"price\":\"1999\",\n" + " \"created_at\":\"2020-05-06\",\n" + " \"description\":\"这是一个好手机\"\n" + "}"; // 指定索引 IndexRequest indexRequest = new IndexRequest("goods").id("1"); // 设置内容 indexRequest.source(json, XContentType.JSON); IndexResponse response = restHighLevelClient.index(indexRequest, RequestOptions.DEFAULT); System.out.println(response.status()); } /** * 更新文档 * POST /goods/_doc/1/_update * { * "doc": { * "price": "小米手机" * } * } */ @Test public void update() throws IOException { UpdateRequest updateRequest = new UpdateRequest("goods", "1"); updateRequest.doc("{\"price\":\"1666\"}", XContentType.JSON); UpdateResponse update = this.restHighLevelClient.update(updateRequest, RequestOptions.DEFAULT); System.out.println(update.status()); } /** * 删除文档 * DELETE /goods/_doc/1 * @throws IOException */ @Test public void delete() throws IOException { DeleteRequest deleteRequest = new DeleteRequest("goods", "1"); DeleteResponse delete = this.restHighLevelClient.delete(deleteRequest, RequestOptions.DEFAULT); System.out.println(delete.status()); } /** * 根据id查询文档 * GET /goods/_doc/1 */ @Test public void get() throws IOException { GetRequest getRequest = new GetRequest("goods", "1"); GetResponse getResponse = this.restHighLevelClient.get(getRequest, RequestOptions.DEFAULT); System.out.println(getResponse.getSourceAsString()); } /** * 查询所有文档 * GET /goods/_search * { * "query": { * "match_all": {} * } * } * @throws IOException */ @Test public void searchAll() throws IOException { SearchRequest searchRequest = new SearchRequest("goods"); // 查询条件构造 SearchSourceBuilder searchSourceBuilder = new SearchSourceBuilder(); searchSourceBuilder.query(QueryBuilders.matchAllQuery()); searchRequest.source(searchSourceBuilder); SearchResponse response = this.restHighLevelClient.search(searchRequest, RequestOptions.DEFAULT); SearchHits hits = response.getHits(); // 获取hits 结果集 for (SearchHit hit : hits) { System.out.println(hit.getSourceAsString()); } } /** * 综合查询 * GET /goods/_search * { * "query": { * "term": { * "description": { * "value": "手机" * } * } * }, * "from": 0, * "size": 20, * "sort": [ * { * "price": { * "order": "desc" * } * } * ], * "_source": ["title", "description"], * "highlight": { * "pre_tags": ["<span color='red'>"], * "post_tags": ["</span>"], * "require_field_match": "false", * "fields": { * "description": {} * } * } * } * @throws IOException */ @Test public void searchTest() throws IOException { SearchRequest searchRequest = new SearchRequest("goods"); // 查询条件构造 SearchSourceBuilder searchSourceBuilder = new SearchSourceBuilder(); searchSourceBuilder .query(QueryBuilders.termQuery("description", "手机")) .from(0) .size(20) .sort("price", SortOrder.DESC) .fetchSource(new String[]{"title", "description"}, new String[]{}) .highlighter(new HighlightBuilder().field("description").preTags("<span color='red'>").postTags("</span>").requireFieldMatch(false)); searchRequest.source(searchSourceBuilder); // 请求 SearchResponse response = this.restHighLevelClient.search(searchRequest, RequestOptions.DEFAULT); System.out.println("总条数: "+response.getHits().getTotalHits().value); SearchHit[] hits = response.getHits().getHits(); for (SearchHit hit : hits) { System.out.println(hit.getSourceAsString()); Map<String, HighlightField> highlightFields = hit.getHighlightFields(); highlightFields.forEach((k,v)-> System.out.println("key: "+k + " value: "+v.fragments()[0])); } }} BBossElastic ORM框架 官方文档 使用 BBossElastic ORM框架最大的好处是能像Mybatis那样通过配置文件动态生成DSL语句 添加maven依赖 12345678910<dependency> <groupId>com.bbossgroups.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>bboss-elasticsearch-rest-jdbc</artifactId> <version>6.5.8</version></dependency><dependency> <groupId>com.bbossgroups.plugins</groupId> <artifactId>bboss-elasticsearch-spring-boot-starter</artifactId> <version>6.5.8</version></dependency> 添加配置 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031spring: elasticsearch: bboss: elasticUser: elasticPassword: elasticsearch: rest: hostNames: 121.37.23.172:9200 ##hostNames: 192.168.8.25:9200,192.168.8.26:9200,192.168.8.27:9200 ##集群地址配置 dateFormat: yyyy-MM-dd timeZone: Asia/Shanghai showTemplate: true discoverHost: false dslfile: refreshInterval: -1 http: timeoutConnection: 5000 timeoutSocket: 5000 connectionRequestTimeout: 5000 retryTime: 1 maxLineLength: -1a maxHeaderCount: 200 maxTotal: 400 defaultMaxPerRoute: 200 soReuseAddress: false soKeepAlive: false timeToLive: 3600000 keepAlive: 3600000 keystore: keyPassword: hostnameVerifier: 添加配置文件 在 resource/es目录下添加配置文件 123456789101112131415161718192021222324<properties> <property name="searchDatas"> <![CDATA[ { "query": { "term": { "description": { "value": #[description] } } }#if($from),#end #if($from) "from": #[from] #end #if($from),#end #if($size) "size": #[size] #end } ]]> <!-- #if($from),#end 用于判断是否要拼接逗号 --> </property></properties> 使用 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334@SpringBootTestpublic class BBossTest { @Autowired private BBossESStarter bBossESStarter; /** * BBossSearch框架动态DSL * https://esdoc.bbossgroups.com/#/development?id=_53-dsl%e9%85%8d%e7%bd%ae%e8%a7%84%e8%8c%83 * */ @Test public void search() { ClientInterface clientUtil = ElasticSearchHelper.getConfigRestClientUtil("es/goods.xml"); Map<String, Object> param = new HashMap<>(); param.put("description", "手机"); // 动态参数,在xml文件里进行IF判断 // https://esdoc.bbossgroups.com/#/development?id=_5316-%e9%80%bb%e8%be%91%e5%88%a4%e6%96%ad%e8%af%ad%e6%b3%95 param.put("from", 0); param.put("size", 20); // 执行查询 // 第一个参数是请求API， 和Kibana是一样的 // 第二个是xml脚本配置对应的模板名称 // 第三个是请求参数 // 第四个是返回类型 ESDatas<Goods> goodsESDatas = clientUtil.searchList("/goods/_search", "searchDatas", param, Goods.class); // 获取总条数 long totalSize = goodsESDatas.getTotalSize(); goodsESDatas.getDatas().forEach(System.out::println); }} 集群 集群概念请参考核心概念 集群节点、分片、副本 P0、P1、P2为主分片 R0、R1、R2为副本 Node-1为主节点 Node-2、Node-3为数据节点 搭建集群 注意 所有节点集群名称必须一致 cluster.name 每个节点必须有一个唯一名字 node.name 开启每个节点远程连接 network.host: 0.0.0.0 指定使用 IP地址进行集群节点通信 network.publish_host: 修改 web 端口 tcp 端口 http.port: transport.tcp.port 指定集群中所有节点通信列表 discovery.seed_hosts: node-1 node-2 node-3 相同 允许集群初始化 master 节点节点数: cluster.initial_master_nodes: [“node-1”, “node-2”,“node-3”] 集群最少几个节点可用 gateway.recover_after_nodes: 2 开启每个节点跨域访问http.cors.enabled: true http.cors.allow-origin: “*” 配置文件 node-1 123456789101112131415161718192021# 指定集群名称 3个节点必须一致cluster.name: es-cluster# 指定节点名称 每个节点名字唯一node.name: node-1# 开放远程链接network.host: 0.0.0.0# 指定使用发布地址进行集群间通信network.publish_host: 127.0.0.1# 指定 web 端口http.port: 9201# 指定 tcp 端口transport.tcp.port: 9301# 指定所有节点的 tcp 通信discovery.seed_hosts: ["127.0.0.1:9301", "127.0.0.1:9302","127.0.0.1:9303"]# 指定可以初始化集群的节点名称cluster.initial_master_nodes: ["node-1", "node-2","node-3"]# 集群最少几个几点可用gateway.recover_after_nodes: 2# 解决跨域问题http.cors.enabled: truehttp.cors.allow-origin: "*" node-2 123456789101112131415161718192021# 指定集群名称 3个节点必须一致cluster.name: es-cluster# 指定节点名称 每个节点名字唯一node.name: node-2# 开放远程链接network.host: 0.0.0.0# 指定使用发布地址进行集群间通信network.publish_host: 127.0.0.1# 指定 web 端口http.port: 9202# 指定 tcp 端口transport.tcp.port: 9302# 指定所有节点的 tcp 通信discovery.seed_hosts: ["127.0.0.1:9301", "127.0.0.1:9302","127.0.0.1:9303"]# 指定可以初始化集群的节点名称cluster.initial_master_nodes: ["node-1", "node-2","node-3"]# 集群最少几个几点可用gateway.recover_after_nodes: 2# 解决跨域问题http.cors.enabled: truehttp.cors.allow-origin: "*" node-3 123456789101112131415161718192021# 指定集群名称 3个节点必须一致cluster.name: es-cluster# 指定节点名称 每个节点名字唯一node.name: node-3# 开放远程链接network.host: 0.0.0.0# 指定使用发布地址进行集群间通信network.publish_host: 127.0.0.1# 指定 web 端口http.port: 9203# 指定 tcp 端口transport.tcp.port: 9303# 指定所有节点的 tcp 通信discovery.seed_hosts: ["127.0.0.1:9301",
